text: BEl-® Route 53 Interoperability @ masttemanitie @ srarcr * R53 normally has 2 jobs - Domain registrar and Domain Hosting ¢ R53 can do BOTH, or either Domain Registrar or Domain Hosting * R53 Accepts your money (domain registration fee) * R53 allocates 4 Name Servers (NS) (domain hosting) * R53 Creates a zone file (domain hosting) on the above NS * R53 communicates with the registry of the TLD (Domain Registrar) e .. sets the NS records for the domain to point at the 4 NS above
